title: GD&T Missing Datum Reference

inputs.description: Single-sheet third-angle projection of a steel mounting bracket. Front, top, and right-side views. A position tolerance feature control frame on the Ø8.00 hole reads: pos | O0.25(M) | A | B | C. Datum A is defined on the bottom face (front view). Datum B is defined on the left face (front view). Datum C is referenced in the FCF but is not defined anywhere on the drawing.

prompt: Identify the one GD&T defect on this drawing and state why it is non-conforming. One sentence.
correct_answer_summary: The position tolerance feature control frame references datum C as a tertiary datum, but datum C is never established on the drawing—no datum feature symbol identifying datum C appears on any view. This makes the tolerance requirement unverifiable and non-conforming per standard GD&T practice.

rubric.item: Identifies that datum C is referenced in the feature control frame but is not defined anywhere on the drawing.
rubric.rationale: The model must read the FCF carefully (A, B, C) and then scan all views to confirm C is absent. Subtle enough to miss.

rubric.item: Correctly names the affected feature as the Ø8.00 hole position tolerance (not a different feature).
rubric.rationale: The hole is the only feature with a position FCF. Models may still name the wrong feature or generic 'position callout'.

rubric.item: Does NOT claim the drawing is missing a surface finish callout as the defect (one is present on the right-side view).
rubric.rationale: Surface finish Ra 1.6 is shown. A careless model may flag this as missing.

rubric.item: Does NOT misidentify the MMC modifier '(M)' on the position tolerance as the defect.
rubric.rationale: The (M) modifier is valid; the defect is the undefined datum. Models familiar with GD&T should not confuse these, but some may.

rubric.item: Does NOT introduce a fabricated defect that is absent from the drawing (e.g., claiming a missing hole depth or wrong tolerance value).
rubric.rationale: Hallucination guard. Vision models sometimes invent additional problems.

qa_status.note: Run qa_runner.py with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set to populate pass counts.
